lines.text: In the notes field you write your honest on-site assessment.
Engine hours, hydraulics, undercarriage wear, leaks, and whether the documents match the machine.
arg: Hydraulics within tolerance. Undercarriage 78% life. Engine hours 4,210. Registration and insurance match the chassis. Legitimacy confirmed.

lines.text: Be specific and be truthful, this note is the record both the client and Nguzo rely on.
A good inspector writes what they actually saw, not what's convenient.
This single note is the difference between a real verification and a rubber stamp.
Once your findings are recorded, you make the final call.
